source_jobs.title: Senior Creative Producer
source_jobs.description:
Join us as a Senior Creative Producer and become the driving force behind building and executing Zeely’s scalable creative engine.

We’re looking for a creative, proactive, and results-oriented professional who can quickly adapt, take ownership, and foster strong cross-team collaboration. In this role, you’ll have full autonomy over the creative production process and a direct impact on growth through social media.

Zeely AI is a platform that uses artificial intelligence to generate viral UGC videos and ad banners, as well as launch effective ad campaigns on Facebook and Instagram, helping small businesses become visible and scale.

We already have 1 million users in the US and are consistently growing more than 4x year-over-year. Today, Zeely is ranked among the Top-3 products in its category on the US market, and our team has grown to over 130 specialists.

What we’re looking for

 - 3+ years of experience in creative marketing.

 - Strong understanding of performance marketing and the ability to extract insights from data and effectively apply them to strategy.

 - A producer mindset — the ability to spot content potential and evaluate its impact on business results.

 - Solid understanding of social media video trends and best-performing creative formats.

 - Proactive attitude with the ability to learn quickly and work independently.

 - Upper-Intermediate English level or higher.
   

Your key responsibilities

 - Create and implement scalable, automated creatives that consistently drive results.

 - Ensure high creative quality with a strong focus on performance metrics such as conversion rate, CTR, and CPA.

 - Continuously research new trends and creative ideas for paid advertising.

 - Collaborate closely with AI Content Creator and AI Prompt Engineer to integrate AI into the creative production process.
   

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves — we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support — consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated finance team
   

Recruitment process:

Intro Call → Hiring Team Interview → Test Task → Final Interview → Reference Check → Offer


Send us your CV — we’d love to get to know you better!

source_jobs.title: HR Operations Specialist
source_jobs.description:
Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI marketing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow faster and achieve their goals through high-performing content and automation. Our platform enables users to create ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns across Meta channels.

A few things that define where we are today:

 - 4 years on the market — a stable, profitable company backed by top international investors;

 - 4x growth over the past year;

 - 1,000,000+ businesses already use Zeely, and that number keeps growing every day;

 - Top 3 in our category in the US market;

 - 170+ specialists on the team;

 - US-focused, with a global user base.

This isn't a role focused on endless administrative tasks. We're looking for an HR Operations Specialist who enjoys building systems, optimizing processes, automating routine work, and improving the employee experience through efficient operational solutions.

If you love bringing structure to processes, working with HRIS platforms, AI tools, and HR analytics, and want to see the real impact of your work — we'd love to meet you!

Your Key Responsibilities:

 - Audit HR processes, identify bottlenecks, and implement standardized, scalable workflows

 - Own the full operational onboarding and offboarding lifecycle: documentation, access management, PeopleForce administration, benefits, and cross-functional coordination

 - Administer and continuously improve our HRIS (PeopleForce): configure workflows, automations, and triggers, maintain data accuracy, and implement new processes

 - Coordinate the probation process by launching check-ins, collecting feedback, preparing analytics, and ensuring a smooth onboarding experience for new hires

 - Create and maintain SOPs, process documentation, templates, and our HR Knowledge Base.

 - Coordinate the administration of employee benefits, learning budgets, subscriptions, and internal AI tools

 - Prepare regular HR analytics and reports, including headcount, turnover, onboarding, benefits, and other HR metrics; identify anomalies and help the team make data-driven decisions

 - Collaborate closely with HR, Finance, IT, and Operations teams to ensure smooth and efficient internal processes across the company

What You Need to Join Us:

 - 2–3+ years of experience in HR Operations, People Operations, or HR Administration within product or tech-driven companies

 - Hands-on experience administering an HRIS (PeopleForce, BambooHR, HiBob, or similar), not just using it as an end user

 - Experience managing the full onboarding and offboarding lifecycle

 - Experience creating SOPs, process documentation, and operational templates

 - Understanding of AI tools and enthusiasm for leveraging them to improve efficiency

 - Experience working with HR analytics and reporting — you're comfortable collecting data, preparing reports, identifying trends, and spotting anomalies

 - A systems-thinking mindset with a passion for improving processes rather than simply maintaining them

 - A process-oriented approach — you look for root causes instead of only fixing symptoms

 - Ability to work independently while knowing when to escalate non-standard situations

 - Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment and effectively prioritizing multiple tasks

 - Strong organizational skills, excellent communication, attention to detail, and a high level of ownership

Why It’s Exciting to Work With Us:

 - Build AI-powered tools with real impact, helping over one million small businesses grow, compete, and launch ads without agencies or complex marketing setups.

 - Join a strong A-level team of experienced professionals who set a high bar and push each other to do better work.

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with access to our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv.

 - We take care of the essentials. Paid time off, sick leaves, and financial support with private entrepreneurship ma

source_jobs.title: Senior Business Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
At Zeely, we are scaling rapidly, and with growth comes increasing complexity of processes. That’s why we are looking for a Senior Business Operations Manager — someone who will help transform chaotic processes into clear, scalable systems.

You will work directly with the Head of Operations, conduct cross-functional process audits, identify inefficiencies, drive improvements, and ensure they lead to measurable business impact.

If you enjoy identifying root causes, building efficient processes, and influencing how an entire company operates - we might be a great match 💚



WHO WE ARE

Zeely AI is an AI-powered marketing platform that helps businesses create ad creatives, UGC content, and launch effective marketing campaigns.

🚀 4× growth over the last year
📈 1,000,000+ businesses use Zeely
🇺🇸 Top-3 player in its category in the US market
👥 170+ team members



YOUR ROLE

You will become an operational partner for all key departments across the company — including Engineering, QA, Product, Analytics, Organic Growth, Marketing, Customer Success, HR, and Legal.

Your mission is to dive deep into different teams’ processes, identify inefficiencies, and own the full improvement cycle:

Problem → Analysis → Solution → Implementation → Impact Measurement



WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Conduct operational audits across different departments.

 - Identify bottlenecks, process losses, and opportunities for improvement.

 - Build process maps, SOPs, RACI frameworks, and improve workflows.

 - Drive process improvements from idea to implementation.

 - Work with Jira, Tableau, and operational metrics.

 - Identify opportunities for automation and increased efficiency.
   


WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - 4+ years of experience in Business Operations, Strategy Operations, Process Management, or Operations Consulting.

 - Proven experience in conducting process audits and optimizing workflows.

 - Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams without direct authority.

 - Strong systems thinking and the ability to identify root causes rather than symptoms.

 - Experience working with Jira and process documentation.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in product tech companies or Big4.

 - Experience building processes from scratch.

 - Proven cases with measurable business impact.
   


WHY THIS ROLE IS EXCITING

In many companies, Operations is mostly about maintaining existing processes.

At Zeely, you will help build the company’s operational system: dive into different departments, identify growth opportunities, drive change, and have a direct impact on business efficiency.

✨ High level of ownership and freedom in decision-making.
✨ Direct collaboration with the Head of Operations and team leaders.
✨ Opportunity to see the real impact of your decisions on company scaling.



WHAT WE OFFER

🚀 Opportunity to work on one of the fastest-growing AI products on the global market.

💚 A team of strong A-level professionals who will inspire you to grow, develop, and achieve ambitious goals together.

🌍 Remote-first culture: work from wherever you feel most productive or join us in our offices in Kyiv or Warsaw.

🏥 Medical insurance, day off, and sick leave — we care about your comfort and healthy work-life balance.

📈 Regular performance reviews, transparent career growth, and recognition of your contribution.

💸 Financial consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated internal team.



HIRING PROCESS

Intro Call → Interview with the Head of Operations → Test Task → Final Interview → Reference Check → Offer

If you are excited about improving complex processes, identifying growth opportunities, and creating a real impact on business efficiency — we would be happy to meet you 💚

source_jobs.title: Backend Lead (Node.js)
source_jobs.description:
Join us as a Backend Lead and drive the development of the backend platform behind one of the fastest-growing AI products in the US market. We are looking for a strong technical leader who combines deep expertise in high-load system architecture with hands-on experience in building and scaling engineering teams.

In this role, you will have true ownership of our AI Gateway, generative pipelines, and mission-critical backend services powering a product already trusted by more than 1.5 million users.

Zeely AI is an AI-powered platform that helps small businesses create viral UGC videos, advertising banners, and high-performing campaigns across Meta and TikTok, making it easier for entrepreneurs to grow and scale their businesses.

Your key responsibilities:

 - Lead the Backend Department, driving team growth, planning, estimations, code reviews, mentoring, and engineers' performance management

 - Define the architectural vision and ensure the reliability, scalability, and performance of the backend platform

 - Develop and evolve our AI orchestration layer across multiple models and providers, optimizing generation quality, latency, and cost efficiency

 - Own the evolution of the AI Gateway — the core platform component powering text, image, voice, avatar, and video generation

 - Scale infrastructure and backend services to support product growth and increasing workloads

 - Maintain high engineering standards in code quality, security, observability, and operational excellence

 - Deliver strategic AI initiatives, including our proprietary RAG pipeline, MCP integrations, and AI agent capabilities

 - Collaborate closely with Frontend, Mobile, QA, AI Engineering, and DevOps teams to achieve business goals

 - Partner with the Principal Engineer on infrastructure capacity planning and cost optimization

What we’re looking for:

 - 7+ years of commercial experience with Node.js

 - 3+ years of experience in a Lead, Team Lead, or Engineering Manager role with direct people management responsibilities

 - 3+ years of hands-on experience with NestJS

 - Proven experience designing and evolving microservice architectures in production environments

 - Deep expertise in PostgreSQL and Redis

 - Experience working with ORMs such as Prisma and Drizzle

 - Hands-on experience with AWS services, including EKS, RDS, SQS, S3, CloudWatch, and OpenSearch

 - Strong Docker expertise

 - Experience designing reliable, scalable, and observable distributed systems

 - Solid understanding of on-call processes and incident management practices

 - Upper-Intermediate English level or higher

Nice to have:

 - Active AWS Architect or Developer certification

 - Experience with Terraform

 - Experience building high-load systems and optimizing cost/latency trade-offs

 - Payment systems integration experience

 - Backend development experience for mobile applications (iOS/Android) and web products

 - Experience with GCP and Cloudflare

 - Experience hiring engineers and building processes in fast-scaling organizations

AI expertise we value:

 - Commercial experience integrating AI APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and others)

 - Understanding of multi-model orchestration, including routing, fallback strategies, and cost/latency trade-offs

 - Experience with AI-assisted development and code review tools (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, etc.)

 - Understanding of RAG, embeddings, MCP, and AI agents (hands-on experience is a strong plus)

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves — we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support — consultations for private entrepreneurs from

source_jobs.title: AI Content Creator (Image ads)
source_jobs.description:
🚀 In 2025, Zeely made a quantum leap, and as our product and team continue to grow rapidly, we’re looking for a talented AI Content Creator to help us develop Zeely’s creative system and launch new concepts into testing and scaling.

At Zeely, we’re passionate about how our work directly impacts the product and business results. That’s why we’re not looking for someone who simply executes briefs — we’re looking for a person who thinks in hypotheses, loves to experiment quickly, and enjoys creating high-performing ad creatives.

If you have experience building performance creatives, are excited about working with AI, and want to create content that can scale across thousands of businesses — we might be a great match 💚

Zeely AI is a platform that uses artificial intelligence to generate viral UGC videos and ad banners, as well as launch effective ad campaigns on Facebook and Instagram, helping small businesses become visible and scale.

We already have 1 million users in the US and are consistently growing more than 4x year-over-year. Today, Zeely is ranked among the Top-3 products in its category on the US market, and our team has grown to over 130 specialists.

We are part of the Google for Startups Alumni community and official partners of Meta and TikTok. In 2024, Zeely was recognized by Forbes Ukraine as one of the Top 25 fastest-growing startups.

Your key responsibilities:

 - creating prompts for image, video, and AI avatar generation

 - building scalable template libraries for different business niches

 - generating series of advertising creatives for Meta Ads

 - testing new generative AI models

 - improving the quality of AI outputs (composition, lighting, textures, realism)

 - building content generation pipelines

 - collaborating with design and product teams

What we’re looking for:

 - hands-on experience with AI content generation (images / video / avatars)

 - a portfolio with AI creatives

 - understanding of composition, lighting, and advertising visual storytelling

 - experience building prompt systems

 - curiosity about new AI tools and the ability to quickly learn new models

Experience with tools:

Image

Nano Banana Pro

Video

ProKling 2.6
Veo 3.1
Sora 2

Nice to have

 - design background (motion / graphic / digital)

 - experience creating ad creatives

 - experience in performance marketing

 - Strong curiosity and research mindset — you actively explore new AI tools, test emerging models, and stay on top of generative AI trends.

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves - we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support - consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated finance team

Recruitment process:

Recruiter Interview → Test Task → Interview with Hiring Manager & CCO → Reference Check → Job Offer.


Send us your CV — we’d love to get to know you better!💚

source_jobs.title: Product Writer
User Acquisition Specialist (Meta Ads)
Growth Product Manager
CRM & Retention Lead
source_jobs.description:
Join us as a CRM & Retention Lead and own Zeely’s entire CRM engine — from defining lifecycle strategy to building scalable activation, retention, and monetization flows.

In this role, CRM goes far beyond email campaigns and serves as a core product and revenue driver, directly impacting user activation, retention, and monetization across the full customer lifecycle. You’ll have full autonomy over CRM funnels and initiatives, work cross-functionally with Product, Growth, Engineering, and Marketing teams, and drive measurable impact on product growth and company revenue.

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI markeing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow faster and achieve their goals through high-performing content and automation. Our platform enables users to create ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns across Meta channels.

In simple terms, we’ve made world-class AI marketing tools and solutions accessible to businesses that previously could only get this level of support from large brands with expensive marketing teams.

A few things that define where we are today:

 - 4 years on the market — a stable, profitable company backed by top international investors;

 - 4x growth over the past year;

 - 1.5M+ users already use Zeely, and that number keeps growing every day;

 - #1 in AIGC in the US market;

 - 200+ specialists on the team;

 - US-focused, with a global user base.

We are not a startup searching for product-market fit — we are scaling what already works. And that comes with a different kind of challenge.

Your Key Responsibilities:

 - Own and evolve the full CRM lifecycle — from registration and first payment to activation, retention, and reactivation — designing end-to-end user journeys across email, mobile push, in-app, and other CRM channels.

 - Drive user activation and early value, guiding users to key actions, reducing Time to First Value, and increasing feature adoption through structured onboarding and lifecycle flows.

 - Design and scale retention and win-back strategies, including cohort-based retention flows and behavioral reactivation campaigns with a measurable impact on churn and engagement.

 - Build CRM initiatives with a direct revenue impact, improving conversion to paid, ARPU, LTV, and the overall contribution of CRM to total revenue.

 - Lead segmentation, personalization, and experimentation, moving from mass messaging to behavioral, event-driven CRM, and owning A/B testing from hypothesis to decision, with proper control groups.

 - Collaborate closely with Product, Analytics, Engineering, and Growth teams, combining strategic ownership with hands-on execution, and continuously improving CRM processes and infrastructure.

What You Need to Join Us:

 - 6+ years of experience in CRM, lifecycle, retention, or product-led marketing roles within product or SaaS companies.

 - Proven experience owning and scaling an end-to-end CRM lifecycle with a measurable impact on activation, retention, and revenue.

 - Strong background in data-driven decision making, including cohort analysis, funnels, and experiment evaluation.

 - Hands-on experience with A/B testing and experimentation, including hypothesis design, control groups, and result interpretation.

 - Deep understanding of activation, retention, and monetization mechanics in subscription-based or usage-based products.

 - Experience working with large user bases (100k+ MAU) and high-volume CRM communications.

 - Strong segmentation and personalization skills, with experience moving from mass campaigns to behavioral and event-driven CRM.

 - Ability to collaborate effectively with Product, Analytics, and Engineering teams, translating business goals into CRM strategies.

 - High level of ownership, autonomy, and accountability — comfortable operating in an environment with evolving processes.

 - Willingness to be hands-on when needed, while building

source_jobs.title: Senior User Acquisition Manager (Meta Ads)
Marketing (Growth) Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
We made a quantum leap in 2025 and are now building one of the largest AI-powered creative production systems on the market.

To scale even faster, we need someone who can help us scale not the team, but the system.

We are looking for a Marketing (Growth) Operations Manager who will become the owner of marketing processes, automations, and the martech function, helping us increase creative output through processes, AI, and automation.

If you enjoy turning chaos into scalable systems and are passionate about AI, automation, and operational efficiency, we might be a great match 💚




WHO WE ARE

Zeely AI is an AI-powered marketing platform that helps businesses create advertising creatives, UGC content, and launch high-performing marketing campaigns.

🚀 4x growth over the last year
📈 1,000,000+ businesses use Zeely
🇺🇸 Top-3 player in its category in the US market
👥 170+ team members worldwide




YOUR MISSION

Your primary goal will be to help us scale creative production through automation, processes, and AI rather than simply growing the team size.

You will operate at the intersection of strategy and execution, enabling our marketing organization to move faster, work more efficiently, and scale through automation.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own the roadmap for marketing automation and AI initiatives.

 - Coordinate the work of the martech team and drive solutions from idea to launch.

 - Write product requirements, acceptance criteria, and process documentation.

 - Analyze workflows, identify bottlenecks, and uncover automation opportunities.

 - Optimize workflows, Jira processes, and reduce manual work.

 - Launch and implement AI, automation, and no-code solutions for marketing and creative production teams.

 - Research emerging martech and AI tools and assess their business impact.

 - Measure and evaluate the effectiveness of automation initiatives and process improvements.
   
   


WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in Operations, Project Management, Marketing Operations, or Creative Operations.

 - Hands-on experience working with Jira.

 - Experience coordinating work with software engineers.

 - Strong ability to write requirements and structure processes.

 - Systems-thinking mindset and strong ownership.

 - Proactive attitude and passion for optimization.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience working with AI tools.

 - Make, Zapier, or Airtable experience.

 - Jira Automation experience.

 - Understanding of APIs, webhooks, and integrations.

 - Experience in performance marketing or creative production environments.




WHY THIS ROLE IS EXCITING

In most companies, Operations Managers spend their time managing statuses and meetings.

At Zeely, this role goes far beyond that.

✨ You'll help build AI-powered marketing operations.
✨ You'll influence how creative production is scaled.
✨ You'll launch automation solutions that create measurable business impact.
✨ You'll work alongside top marketers, designers, project managers, and engineers.
✨ You'll have significant ownership and freedom to make decisions.

This is an opportunity to lead the AI and automation wave rather than catch up with it years later.




WHAT WE OFFER

💰 Competitive compensation package
🏥 Health insurance
🌍 Fully remote work or office access in Warsaw or Kyiv
⏰ Flexible working hours




HIRING PROCESS

Intro Call → Hiring Manager Interview → Test Task → Final Interview → Reference Check → Offer

If you're excited about AI, automation, and building scalable systems — and want to influence a product used by more than 1 million businesses — we'd love to meet you 🚀

source_jobs.title: AI Marketing Automation Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Join us as an AI Marketing Automation Engineer and help us build user-facing AI workflows, agents, and product features that help marketing teams around the world research, create, analyze, and scale advertising campaigns faster.

Zeely is an AI marketing platform that helps small businesses, creators, and marketing teams create UGC videos, ad banners, product visuals, and launch effective campaigns on Meta and TikTok — without agencies, complex marketing tools, or deep performance marketing expertise.

We are expanding how AI supports the full marketing workflow: from creative research and content production to campaign launch, performance insights, recommendations, and scaling.

We already have 1.5M+ users in the US, are ranked among the Top-1 products in our category on the US market, and continue growing more than 4x year-over-year. Our team has grown to over 200 specialists.

About The Role:
We are looking for a hands-on AI automation builder who can turn complex marketing and creative workflows into scalable user-facing product features. You will build AI-powered workflows, agents, and integrations inside the Zeely platform that help small businesses, creators, and marketing teams around the world automate creative research, asset preparation, campaign analysis, recommendations, and other high-volume advertising workflows.

Your Key Responsibilities:

 - Analyze how Zeely users research, create, launch, and optimize advertising campaigns to identify repetitive tasks, bottlenecks, and opportunities for AI automation.

 - Design user-facing AI workflows for creative research, asset preparation, campaign analysis, reporting, recommendations, and campaign optimization.

 - Build prototypes and MVPs using LLMs, APIs, automation platforms, scripts, databases, and product integrations.

 - Work with ad creatives, UGC videos, hooks, scripts, briefs, campaign data, performance insights, and public competitor research sources.

 - Connect AI models, marketing data, content sources, external services, APIs, and product data into scalable workflows inside the Zeely platform.

 - Validate automation quality through real user scenarios: accuracy, reliability, usefulness, edge cases, clarity, and measurable value for marketing teams.

 - Improve workflows based on user feedback, product analytics, failed runs, data quality issues, and changing marketing needs.

 - Document system logic, prompts, integrations, data flows, experiments, and decisions so solutions can be reused, improved, and scaled across the product.


What We Are Looking For:

 - 3+ years of hands-on experience in AI Automation, TechOps, Marketing Automation, Growth Operations, Creative Operations, Product Automation, or similar roles with a strong technical automation focus.

 - Experience working with creative factories, performance marketing teams, media buying, adtech products, agencies, mobile apps, SaaS products, or content production teams where many creatives, campaigns, launches, and experiments run at scale.

 - Proven ability to turn manual marketing or creative workflows into scalable automation systems — for example: creative research, brief generation, asset preparation, campaign insights, reporting, recommendations, or workflow automation.

 - Strong understanding of how marketing and creative teams work: research → brief → creative concept → production → launch → performance analysis → iteration.

 - Strong technical foundation: APIs, webhooks, databases, data pipelines, automation platforms, AI / LLM tools, and Python or JavaScript.

 - Ability to work with messy, undefined product problems: understand user needs, clarify requirements, identify bottlenecks, design an MVP, and bring it to a usable product workflow.

 - Strong product thinking: you care not only that automation works technically, but also that it is useful, clear, reliable, and easy for real users to adopt.

 - High ownership, structure, and maturity: you can work directly with Product, M

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Now we’re looking for a Senior Product Manager who will help improve the user experience and customer loyalty within our product.

Zeely AI is a platform that uses artificial intelligence to generate viral UGC videos and ad banners, as well as launch effective ad campaigns on Facebook and Instagram, helping small businesses become visible and scale.

We already have 1 million users in the US and are consistently growing more than 4x year-over-year. Today, Zeely is ranked among the Top-3 products in its category on the US market, and our team has grown to over 150 specialists.




WHAT YOU NEED TO JOIN US:

 - 7+ years of experience as a Product Manager (B2C background is highly valued), including leadership roles.

 - Proven track record of scaling digital products.

 - Strong analytical skills — ability to work with data, conduct market research, and turn insights into actionable ideas.

 - Experience with subscription-based products.

 - Hands-on knowledge of product analytics (Amplitude, Firebase) and marketing analytics (AppsFlyer, Google Analytics).

 - Deep understanding of marketing and product metrics.

 - Experience running A/B tests.

 - Proven results in implementing retention and growth strategies.

 - Ability to plan, prioritize, and manage release cycles (close collaboration with product and engineering teams).

 - UI/UX design culture fit.

 - Solid knowledge of Jobs-To-Be-Done and other product methodologies.

 - Upper-Intermediate English or higher.


WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON:

 - Develop and execute product strategy aligned with company vision and business goals.

 - Build and optimize key user flows (web & mobile).

 - Drive product growth and performance through data-driven decision-making.

 - Optimize monetization models, especially subscriptions.

 - Coordinate cross-functional collaboration with development, marketing, analytics, and design teams.

 - Implement modern product management approaches and improve internal processes.

 - Analyze markets and competitors to bring innovative features.

 - Run A/B tests and introduce changes based on analytics to boost engagement and retention.

 - Contribute to scaling the product: launching new features and expanding to new markets.

 - Work closely with stakeholders across Engineering, Marketing, Admin, and Customer Success to hit strategic goals.


WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and develop AI-driven tools.

 - Join a strong A-player team.

 - Freedom to implement ideas and directly impact the product.

 - Build a product that is already a Top-5 player in its vertical in the U.S.

 - Be part of a global company with opportunities to grow into top leadership positions.

 - Work in a startup growing 4× year-over-year in the U.S. market.

 - Fully remote work with an option to join us in our cozy Warsaw or Kyiv offices.



RECRUITMENT PROCESS:

Recruiter Interview → Hiring Manager Interview → Test Task → Hiring Manager Review → Reference Check → Job Offer


You’ll be working directly with stakeholders. This is your chance to join a fast-scaling startup at an exciting stage and build your career with us.


Apply now — let’s talk!

source_jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer (Node.js)
source_jobs.description:
Join Zeely AI as a Senior Backend Developer and help build one of the largest AI products for businesses. We're looking for a strong backend engineer who wants to work on high-load services, influence architectural decisions, and build systems that scale alongside a rapidly growing business.

Over the past six months, our backend team has grown to 14 engineers, and we're continuing to expand. Today, Zeely is the #1 AI product in its niche in the U.S. market, and our ambitious goal is to become a global company by 2028.

You'll be joining a strong engineering environment, working alongside former Tech Leads, Engineering Managers, and Senior Engineers who foster a high engineering standard, support each other's growth, and tackle complex technical challenges together.

Zeely AI is an AI-powered platform that helps businesses scale by creating viral UGC videos, generating ad creatives, and launching high-performing advertising campaigns across Meta and TikTok. Today, more than 1.5 million users rely on Zeely, and that number continues to grow every day.

Want to see what we're building? Check out examples of our AI-generated videos on our website and across our Instagram, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn. We highly recommend taking a look before applying—it's the best way to experience the product you'll be working on.

Your key responsibilities:

 - Developing and maintaining the back-end of web applications

 - Designing and building REST APIs

 - Working with PostgreSQL and Redis databases

 - Integrating with third-party APIs

 - Building and deploying applications on AWS (EC2, S3, CloudFront)

 - Writing unit and integration tests

 - Optimizing application performance

 - Debugging and troubleshooting issues

 - Writing technical documentation

 - Conducting code reviews

What we’re looking for:

 - 5+ years of commercial experience with Node.js applications

 - 1+ years of experience with microservices architecture

 - 2+ years of hands-on work with Redis and PostgreSQL/MySQL (data modeling, indexing, caching, ORM such as Prisma/TypeORM/Drizzle ORM)

 - Experience with AWS

 - 2+ years of experience with message brokers

 - 1+ years of experience with Docker

 - Understanding of scalable and reliable system design principles

 - Experience with version control systems (Git)

Nice to have:

 - 1+ years of experience with the NestJS framework

 - Experience with payment systems

 - Valid AWS certification

 - Commercial experience with high-load systems

 - Experience building back-end for iOS, Android, and web applications

 - Experience with Terraform/Pulumi

 - Commercial experience with AI APIs

 - English level: Upper-Intermediate

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves — we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support — consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated finance team

Recruitment process: Intro call > Test Task > Technical Interview > Final Interview > Reference check > Offer

Send us your CV — we’d love to get to know you better!

source_jobs.title: Lead SEO Specialist
source_jobs.description:
We are looking for an experienced Lead SEO Specialist who will help us grow a game-changing product and build the Organic Growth direction at Zeely AI. We need a self-driven, results-oriented professional with strong case studies, ready to take ownership and implement improvements. There’s no micromanagement here — instead, you’ll have freedom to act, regular performance reviews, and transparent opportunities for both professional and financial growth.

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI-powered marketing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow and achieve their business goals.

The platform enables users to create high-quality ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns on Facebook and Instagram.

In simple terms: we’ve made the world’s best AI marketing tools accessible to everyone — tools that were previously available only to large brands with expensive marketing teams.

Numbers that speak louder than words:

 - 4 years on the market = a stable, profitable company backed by top-tier international investors

 - 4× growth over the past year

 - 1,000,000+ businesses already use Zeely, and the number is growing rapidly every day

 - Top 3 in its category in the U.S. market

 - 160+ team members

 - Markets: U.S. + worldwide

We are not a startup searching for product-market fit — we are scaling what already works. And that comes with a different kind of challenge.


Your key responsibilities:

 - Development and implementation of SEO and SEM strategies to drive product growth

 - Collaboration with PR and cross-functional teams to strengthen organic growth

 - Market, competitor, and keyword analysis, semantic clustering, and preparation of technical requirements

 - Managing the content team and working with content using AI tools

 - Conducting technical audits and assigning tasks to developers

 - Creating page prototypes with SEO and conversion elements in mind

 - Analyzing user behavior and optimizing the conversion funnel

 - Website deployment and optimization (WordPress, SEO plugins, structured data, sitemap, robots.txt)

 - Developing a link-building strategy, collaborating with external partners, and managing the budget

 - Building an SEO strategy adapted for LLMs and emerging search formats

What we’re looking for:

 - 6+ years of experience as an SEO Specialist, including work in English-speaking markets

 - Proven track record of driving 30–50K+ monthly organic traffic

 - Hands-on experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs / Semrush, Screaming Frog, Surfer) and process automation using GPT or other AI solutions

 - Strong knowledge of Google Analytics and Google Search Console

 - Solid understanding of On-page, Off-page, and technical optimization

 - Experience in running experiments and A/B testing

 - Background in managing a content team and handling link building through external vendors

 - Basic skills in analyzing traffic conversion within the funnel

 - English proficiency: Upper-Intermediate+


WILL BE A PLUS:

 - Experience with B2B / B2C SaaS products.

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves — we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support — consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated finance team

Recruitment process: Interview with Recruiter > Interview with the Hiring Team > Test Assignment > Final interview with CEO > Reference Check > Job Offer.



Send us your CV — we’d love to get to know you better!

source_jobs.title: Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
We’re looking for a Motion Designer to create high-converting video ads for social media.

If crafting game-changing marketing videos is your thing — we’d love to invite you to join our team and create amazing results together!

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI-powered marketing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow and achieve their business goals.

The platform enables users to create high-quality ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns on Facebook and Instagram.

In simple terms: we’ve made the world’s best AI marketing tools accessible to everyone — tools that were previously available only to large brands with expensive marketing teams.

Numbers that speak louder than words:

 - 4 years on the market = a stable, profitable company backed by top-tier international investors

 - 4× growth over the past year

 - 1,000,000+ businesses already use Zeely, and the number is growing rapidly every day

 - Top 3 in its category in the U.S. market

 - 160+ team members

 - Markets: U.S. + worldwide

We are not a startup searching for product-market fit — we are scaling what already works. And that comes with a different kind of challenge.

What you’ll need to join us:

 - 2+ years of experience as a Motion Designer

 - Proficiency in After Effects, Figma, and Adobe Photoshop

 - A portfolio that clearly reflects your skills and creative style

 - Ability to follow briefs while contributing your own ideas

 - Strong grasp of composition, editing techniques, rhythm, and color

Nice to have:

What you’ll be doing:

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Freedom to bring your ideas to life and shape the product

 - A team of Senior/Lead-level professionals with shared goals and strong experience

 - A product that’s a Top 5 player in its niche on the U.S. market

 - We’re building a global company, offering real growth to top roles

 - Fully remote, or join us in our comfortable Warsaw office if you prefer

Recruitment process: Intro Call > Test task > Hiring Team Interview > Reference check > Offer

You’ll work directly with stakeholders and join a fast-growing, stable startup — right at an exciting stage. Build your career with us.

Message us — let’s talk!

source_jobs.title: AI Engineer  (Image/Video Generation)
source_jobs.description:
Join us as an AI Engineer (Image & Video Generation) and help us build automated image and video generation pipelines for next-generation advertising content.
We are looking for a specialist who understands how to turn a creative idea, product, or business context into a high-quality image/video creative — in a stable, scalable, and product-oriented way.

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI markeing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow faster and achieve their goals through high-performing content and automation. Our platform enables users to create ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns across Meta channels.

In simple terms, we’ve made world-class AI marketing tools and solutions accessible to businesses that previously could only get this level of support from large brands with expensive marketing teams.

A few things that define where we are today:

 - 4 years on the market — a stable, profitable company backed by top international investors;

 - 4x growth over the past year;

 - 1.5M+ users already use Zeely, and that number keeps growing every day;

 - #1 in AIGC in the US market;

 - 200+ specialists on the team;

 - US-focused, with a global user base.

Your Key Responsibilities:

 - Design and improve generative pipelines for image and video creation.

 - Build quick prototypes, demos, and internal tools to validate new generation approaches.

 - Optimize image-to-video, text-to-video, and reference-based generation workflows for stable and reproducible results.

 - Work with UGC videos, product visuals, avatars, hooks, static ads, and other advertising formats.

 - Tune and control generation behavior: visual quality, style consistency, product fidelity, and reference alignment.

 - Diagnose quality bottlenecks: artifacts, instability, product distortions, inconsistency, weak lighting, poor composition.

 - Extend generative systems for new products, creative formats, and marketing scenarios.

 - Research and test new image/video models, tools, and workflows, separating hype from real product value.

 - Document workflow logic, prompts, parameters, model choices, experiments, and decisions to ensure reproducibility and smooth handoff to Product, Creative, Content, and Engineering teams.

What We Are Looking For:

 - Hands-on experience in Generative AI, AI automation, creative tech, media generation, or similar fields.

 - Practical understanding of image/video generation and multi-step workflows.

 - Ability to work not only with single generations, but with repeatable systems that can be tested, improved, and scaled.

 - Experience with generative models across different scenarios: text-to-image, image-to-image, image-to-video, video-to-video, or multimodal workflows.

 - Strong prompt engineering skills for image and video models.

 - Ability to independently assess visual quality of generated outputs: composition, lighting, consistency, product alignment, and overall creative quality.

 - Understanding of UGC/ad content, product-focused generation, and performance-oriented creative formats.

 - Analytical thinking: ability to identify cause-and-effect relationships when diagnosing and improving generation systems.

 - Experience integrating AI solutions through APIs, no-code/low-code tools, scripts, or other technical approaches.

 - Creative thinking combined with engineering structure.

 - Ability to explain complex technical concepts in simple language.

Nice To Have:

 - Experience with generative AI workflow tools and approaches such as ComfyUI, n8n or similar automation platforms, LLM/agent-based workflows, LoRA tuning or fine-tuning image/video models.

 - Practical experience with Python or AI/ML libraries.

 - Experience working with media processing tools: ffmpeg, moviepy, imageio, pydub, or similar.

 - Experience building internal AI/creative tools for designers, producers, marketers, or content teams.

 - Ex

source_jobs.title: Senior DevOps Engineer (Infrastructure)
source_jobs.description:
Join us as a Senior DevOps Engineer and take ownership of evolving and scaling the infrastructure behind Zeely’s AI-driven platform.

We’re looking for a senior infrastructure engineer who thrives in ownership, complexity, and scale — someone who can design resilient systems, define infrastructure standards, and shape the long-term architecture of our platform. In this role, you’ll work closely other DevOps engineers & engineering teams to improve reliability and developer experience across a complex multi-cloud environment, scaling our CI/CD and observability stack, leading infrastructure integrations, and optimizing cloud costs while strengthening monitoring and alerting.

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI markeing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow faster and achieve their goals through high-performing content and automation. Our platform enables users to create ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, banners, and more, as well as launch effective paid and organic campaigns across Meta channels.

In simple terms, we’ve made world-class AI marketing tools and solutions accessible to businesses that previously could only get this level of support from large brands with expensive marketing teams.

A few things that define where we are today:

 - 4 years on the market — a stable, profitable company backed by top international investors;

 - 4x growth over the past year;

 - 1.5M+ users already use Zeely, and that number keeps growing every day;

 - #1 in AIGC in the US market;

 - 200+ specialists on the team;

 - US-focused, with a global user base.

Your Key Responsibilities:

 - Maintain and optimize AWS infrastructure, including EKS, RDS, SQS, S3, OpenSearch and related services, to ensure reliability, scalability and efficient resource usage.

 - Manage and scale GCP environments supporting AI services, data pipelines and analytics workloads, including services such as BigQuery.

 - Maintain supporting infrastructure across Cloudflare and Hetzner where applicable, including networking, edge services and production traffic routing.

 - Drive Infrastructure as Code practices with Terraform across cloud providers to ensure consistency, maintainability and clear infrastructure ownership.

 - Maintain and improve Kubernetes-based production environments, ensuring high availability, autoscaling and stable deployment processes.

 - Refine monitoring, logging and alerting to improve signal quality, incident response and infrastructure visibility.

 - Implement, maintain and improve APM and observability tooling.

 - Ensure high availability and resilience of production infrastructure under growing product workloads.

 - Contribute to the development of our multi-cloud infrastructure strategy with a focus on AWS and GCP.

 - Collaborate with engineering teams to improve CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure reliability and developer experience.

 - Continuously optimize cloud infrastructure costs through FinOps practices while maintaining performance and reliability.

 - Participate in on-call rotations, ensuring timely response to critical infrastructure incidents when they occur.

What You Need to Join Us:

 - Must have:
   
   - 6+ years of hands-on commercial DevOps experience.
   
   - 5+ years of practical experience with AWS, including services such as EKS, EC2, RDS, SQS, S3, OpenSearch and related infrastructure components.
   
   - Strong Kubernetes administration and troubleshooting skills, preferably with EKS.
   
   - Advanced experience with Terraform, including modules, state management and multi-provider infrastructure.
   
   - Hands-on experience with GCP, ideally including BigQuery, Compute Engine, data pipelines or related services.
   
   - Strong Linux, networking and security fundamentals.
   
   - Experience with production infrastructure ownership, monitoring, alerting and incident response.
   
   - English — Upper-Intermediate / B2 or higher, with the ability to communicate with external p

source_jobs.title: Creative Marketing Manager
source_jobs.description:
We made a quantum leap in 2025, and due to our rapid growth and team expansion, I’m looking for a talented creative mind to join us in developing Zeely’s creative strategy and launching bold, breakthrough concepts into testing and scaling.

At Zeely, we are passionate about what we do and deeply excited about how our work impacts both the product and real business results. That’s why we’re not looking for someone who simply “executes briefs”.

We’re looking for someone who thinks in hypotheses, loves experimenting quickly and often, and genuinely enjoys the craft of creative marketing - just like the rest of our team.

If you have experience creating high-performing creatives, want to ride the AI wave with us, and feel limited by the scope, niche, or budgets of your current product — this might be the perfect match.



WHO WE ARE

Zeely AI is an all-in-one AI marketing platform that helps small businesses and marketing teams grow and achieve their business goals.

Using artificial intelligence, users can create high-quality ad creatives, UGC videos, viral content, advertising banners, and launch effective paid & organic campaigns on Facebook and Instagram.

Simply put:
We’ve made the best AI marketing tools in the world accessible to everyday entrepreneurs - tools that previously were only available to large brands with expensive marketing teams.



NUMBERS THAT SPEAK LOUDER THAN WORDS

• 4 years on the market - a stable, profitable company backed by top international investors
• ×4 growth over the past year
• 1,000,000+ businesses already use Zeely, and the number is growing daily
• Top-3 in our category in the US market
• 150+ specialists on the team
• Markets: US + worldwide

We’re not a startup searching for product-market fit.
We’re a successful business scaling what already works, and we’re looking for someone who will help accelerate that growth.



YOUR ROLE

You will be responsible for creative performance, owning the process from hypothesis to results in analytical reports.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Generate hypotheses and create creative concepts for paid channels (Meta, TikTok, etc.)
• Test different creative formats - from UGC and AI-generated content to entirely new concepts you invent
• Work with analytics dashboards, analyze test results, and turn data into new hypotheses
• Monitor social media trends and adapt them for our product
• Scale winning concepts and launch new creative directions
• Suggest ideas and hypotheses for funnel and acquisition testing
• Collaborate with top-tier performers: Motion Designers, Creative Marketing Managers, Growth Product Manager, User Acquisition Manager, Influencer Marketing Managers

Your impact will be direct.
Your creatives will be seen by millions of entrepreneurs in the US, helping them grow the businesses they care about most.



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

• 2+ years of experience in creative marketing
• Strong understanding of performance marketing and key metrics
• Ability to analyze data and turn insights into creative hypotheses
• Strong research skills and the ability to find ideas across multiple channels and sources
• Deep understanding of hooks, attention triggers, and social media trends
• Strong creative intuition and the ability to identify patterns in what works on Meta / TikTok
• English Upper-Intermediate+ (working with the US market)
• Proactive mindset, attention to detail, and ability to make independent decisions

Nice to have

• Experience working with multiple niches/products
• Experience using AI tools in creative workflows



WHY ZEELY IS NOT JUST ANOTHER OFFER

Sometimes ideas get stuck in endless approvals, committees, and layers of management.

At Zeely it’s different:

• Feedback within 24 hours on ideas, materials, and hypotheses
• Zero bureaucracy — decisions are made fast
• Zero toxicity or devaluation — a team of senior/lead professionals who communicate openly and support each other
• High creative freedom — we don’t micromanage; we focus on result

source_jobs.title: Tech Lead Flutter
source_jobs.description:
We are looking for a Flutter Tech Lead to join the Zeely team. This is an opportunity to grow a product with a million+ user base, where stability, scalability, and high-quality solutions really matter. Our ambitious goal is to build a billion-dollar product within the next 3 years.

The mobile team currently consists of 5 Flutter developers (middle and senior level). In the Tech Lead role, you will combine hands-on development (around 80% of your time) with technical leadership and team support (around 20%). You will have a direct impact on architectural decisions, code quality, and the overall evolution of the mobile product.

Zeely AI is an AI-powered platform that helps small businesses stand out and scale by creating viral UGC videos, ad creatives, and running effective advertising campaigns on Facebook and Instagram. We operate in the Tier-1 market.

Your key responsibilities:

 - Lead and coordinate the mobile team, ensuring motivation and professional growth.

 - Analyze requirements and estimate task delivery timelines.

 - Contribute to key technical and architectural decisions.

 - Perform code reviews.

 - Design, develop, and maintain mobile applications using our stack and modern technologies.

 - Test software to ensure performance and reliability.

 - Troubleshoot, debug, and update applications.

 - Stay up to date with industry trends and ensure our apps remain innovative.

 - Work in a continuous delivery environment.

 - Collaborate with the product team to ensure intuitive and user-friendly solutions.

What we’re looking for:

 - 5+ years of mobile development experience (including 3+ years with Flutter & Dart).

 - 2+ years of experience as a Team Lead or Tech Lead.

 - Experience with native mobile development.

 - Strong knowledge of OOP, SOLID, and DRY principles.

 - Hands-on experience with REST API, JSON, HTTP, WebSocket, Analytics SDKs, Firebase.

 - Understanding of state management (Provider, BLoC, GetX).

 - Proficiency with Git and version control workflows.

 - Experience with publishing apps to Google Play and the App Store.

Why it’s exciting to work with us:

 - Work with cutting-edge technologies and contribute to building AI-powered tools

 - Join a strong A-level team that motivates you to grow and achieve more

 - Remote-first approach: work from anywhere, with the option to visit our offices in Warsaw and Kyiv

 - Paid day offs and sick leaves — we care about your work-life balance

 - Regular performance reviews to ensure your growth is transparent and rewarded

 - Financial support — consultations for private entrepreneurs from our dedicated finance team

Recruitment process: Intro Call > Test Task > Final Interview > Reference check > Offer

Send us your CV — we’d love to get to know you better!

notes: High-growth AI marketing platform with a strong focus on product development and engineering.
